title: Salesforce report builder and client profitability backend-first contract
salesforce_visible_capabilities: Client-level profitability and business overview analytics
lazyweb_reference_patterns: enterprise analytics screens use reports/dashboards navigation rather than a single chart pile
reporting builder patterns combine filters, tabular result, chart result, saved report metadata, and sharing controls
self-service reporting should not be exposed until query execution, permission checks, and audit evidence are real

existing_domain_foundation_properties: MatterProfitability and ClientProfitability package services exist and persist safe analytic read models
ClientProfitability is mounted through apps/api and exposed through apiClient and Client reports UI
current Matter analytics UI lists dashboards, matter profitability, refresh, and export-review actions only; Client reports UI handles report builder and Client profitability
current export control creates review-ready export metadata and omits credential material
report definition CRUD, safe aggregate query runtime, bounded report result table/chart runtime, owner-blocked report share route, and report audit route are mounted
current_ui_boundary: Matter analytics may display existing dashboard and matter profitability records from tested routes
Matter analytics may expose dashboard refresh, matter profitability refresh, and analytics export-review actions from tested routes
Client UI may show client profitability charts, client profitability refresh, and client-level business overview analytics from tested routes

Client UI may show report builder, report field picker, filter builder, saved report list, report run button, chart/table report result, owner-blocked share controls, and report audit from tested routes
No raw matter detail, row-level billing source payload, direct personal contact value, hidden tenant/user id, or credential material may be exposed in report or profitability output

route_policy_contract.service_boundary: List saved report definitions for the tenant with object type, columns, filters, chart type, owner label, and share state only; row data and source payload omitted
Create a saved report definition from allowlisted object, column, filter, grouping, and chart metadata; no query execution or source mutation at save time
Patch saved report metadata, columns, filters, grouping, and chart config with idempotency and audit; no source-object mutation

route_policy_contract.repository_source: reporting-query-runtime + analytics read models + finance read models
route_policy_contract.service_boundary: Run a safe aggregate query from an allowlisted report definition; return bounded table/chart rows, omitted-row counts, and safe error codes only
Create report share grants for user, group, or role refs after permission check; recipient direct contact values omitted and audit event required
Read report definition, run, and share audit events with actor labels, action labels, and timestamps only; raw query payloads omitted
Read ClientProfitability records aggregated by Party Master ClientGroup with matter_count, profitability amount, and source mutation flags only
Refresh client profitability from existing matter profitability rows; must not create ClientGroup identity, mutate Matter/Finance source objects, or expose row-level billing payload

safe_output_rules: row data omitted from definition responses
no arbitrary SQL or unbounded source scans
bounded result rows and omitted-row counts
raw matter detail and raw billing payload omitted
share targets are user/group/role refs only
grant/revoke actions require audit and permission decision
share does not bypass row-level report permissions
matter-level rows and billing payload omitted

owner_decisions_required: which report object scopes are allowed for Client, Matter, Finance, DMS, Analytics, and Admin data
which dimensions and metrics can be queried by role without exposing sensitive row-level detail
whether saved report definitions are tenant-global, team-scoped, or private-by-default
report sharing target taxonomy and revocation policy
client profitability currency, realization, write-off, tax, and matter inclusion rules
whether client profitability may appear in Client record workspace before broader report builder ships
retention and export policy for report run results and report audit events
verification_cases: VC-SF-B-W08-API-001: report definition list returns metadata only and omits row data, raw SQL, and source payload
VC-SF-B-W08-API-002: report definition create accepts only allowlisted object scopes, columns, filters, groupings, and chart config
VC-SF-B-W08-API-003: report definition patch is idempotent, audited, tenant-scoped, and mutates no source objects
VC-SF-B-W08-API-004: report query run returns bounded aggregate table/chart rows, omitted-row counts, and safe errors only
VC-SF-B-W08-API-005: report share requires permission check, uses user/group/role refs, and omits direct recipient contact values
VC-SF-B-W08-API-006: report audit read omits raw query payloads and exposes no hidden tenant/user ids
VC-SF-B-W08-API-007: client profitability read returns ClientGroup aggregates only and omits matter-level billing rows
VC-SF-B-W08-API-008: client profitability refresh uses existing MatterProfitability rows, does not create ClientGroup identity, and emits analytics audit
VC-SF-B-W08-UI-001: Client/Matter UI exposes no report builder, report run/share controls, saved report list, report result table/chart, or client profitability controls before route tests pass

route_mounted_evidence: Playwright Client report builder and client profitability QA
OMO CodeGraph caller check for report definition handlers, report query runtime, report share handlers, and client profitability route handlers
Hermes MCP check-only: hermes.validate.core and hermes.desktop_authority_boundary
evidence_gate.claim_boundary: Passing this contract validator does not create production, deployment, final approval, go-live, or enterprise trust claims.
